title: veronica anagallis-aquatica subsp. neilreichii
intro: Veronica anagallis-aquatica subsp. neilreichii, also known as the water speedwell, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Veronica anagallis-aquatica subsp. neilreichii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make infusions, teas, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
